params.name: STC
params.description: Forged in humanity’s Golden Age, this template housed the full archive of adaptive industrial design. From orbital foundries to Titan-class warframes, it auto-generated blueprints fit for any planetary terrain. Local matter was restructured via atomic transmutation—instant hardware, zero logistics. Lost in the Rebellion, only fractured schematics survive. Every shard sparks a war.
